requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and INEN RTE Conformity Requirements for Ecuador BESS
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619及INEN RTE合格评定要求（厄瓜多尔BESS）
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619及INEN RTE合格評定要求（厄瓜多BESS）

summary.en: INEN (Servicio Ecuatoriano de Normalización) is Ecuador's national standards body. INEN issues two types of standards: NTE INEN (Normas Técnicas Ecuatorianas — voluntary technical standards) and RTE INEN (Reglamentos Técnicos Ecuatorianos — mandatory technical regulations). Ecuador adopts IEC standards as the basis for its technical regulations. Where a BESS product category is covered by an RTE INEN mandatory regulation, an INEN conformity certificate (certificado de conformidad) is required before the product may be imported or sold in Ecuador. No confirmed RTE INEN specifically covering stationary BESS systems (cells, modules, or systems) has been identified from publicly accessible INEN sources as of the dataset date — exporters must verify the current INEN regulated-product scope at normalizacion.gob.ec before shipment. Regardless of mandatory product regulation status, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules. Project owners, ARCERNNR, and distribution companies in Ecuador are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite for BESS project approval and grid-connection.
summary.zh: INEN（厄瓜多尔标准化服务局）是厄瓜多尔国家标准机构。INEN发布两类标准：NTE INEN（厄瓜多尔技术标准——自愿性技术标准）和RTE INEN（厄瓜多尔技术法规——强制性技术法规）。厄瓜多尔以IEC标准为基础制定技术法规。若BESS产品类别受RTE INEN强制法规约束，则在厄瓜多尔进口或销售前须取得INEN合格证书（certificado de conformidad）。截至本数据集日期，尚未从可公开获取的INEN来源确认专门涵盖固定式BESS系统（电芯、模组或系统）的RTE INEN——出口商须在出货前通过normalizacion.gob.ec核实INEN现行受监管产品范围。无论是否受强制性产品法规约束，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）均是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准。厄瓜多尔项目业主、ARCERNNR和配电公司预计将以IEC 62619合规作为BESS项目审批和并网的技术前提。
summary.zht: INEN（厄瓜多標準化服務局）是厄瓜多國家標準機構。INEN發布兩類標準：NTE INEN（厄瓜多技術標準——自願性技術標準）和RTE INEN（厄瓜多技術法規——強制性技術法規）。厄瓜多以IEC標準為基礎制定技術法規。若BESS產品類別受RTE INEN強制法規約束，則在厄瓜多進口或銷售前須取得INEN合格證書（certificado de conformidad）。截至本數據集日期，尚未從可公開獲取的INEN來源確認專門涵蓋固定式BESS系統（電芯、模組或系統）的RTE INEN——出口商須在出貨前通過normalizacion.gob.ec核實INEN現行受監管產品範圍。無論是否受強制性產品法規約束，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）均是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準。厄瓜多項目業主、ARCERNNR和配電公司預計將以IEC 62619合規作為BESS項目審批和併網的技術前提。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety; basis for IEC-aligned INEN technical requirements)
IEC 62133 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (may apply to smaller BESS modules depending on classification)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)

INEN RTE INEN — mandatory technical regulations applicable to regulated product categories; verify current scope at normalizacion.gob.ec (no confirmed RTE INEN specifically for stationary BESS as of dataset date)
INEN NTE INEN — voluntary technical standards aligned with IEC; reference for product technical specifications

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 by INEN or in Ecuador project specifications. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certifications alone are insufficient for Ecuador project acceptance where IEC 62619 evidence is required.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被INEN或厄瓜多尔项目规格接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。在要求IEC 62619证据的情况下，仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足厄瓜多尔项目验收要求。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被INEN或厄瓜多項目規格接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。在要求IEC 62619證據的情況下，僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足厄瓜多項目驗收要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: INEN issues mandatory RTE INEN technical regulations based on IEC standards; if a regulated BESS product category exists, an INEN conformity certificate is required for import and sale in Ecuador. Independently of mandatory RTE INEN scope, project owners, ARCERNNR, and distribution companies reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules — Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not accepted as substitutes. Exporters should: (a) verify the current INEN RTE INEN regulated-product list at normalizacion.gob.ec for any mandatory pre-import conformity certificate obligation covering BESS cells or systems; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Ecuador BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition and any INEN-specific additional requirements before committing to a test programme; (d) if an RTE INEN conformity certificate is required, engage an INEN-accredited conformity assessment body (organismo de certificación) for product certification before shipment.
gap.zh: 关键差距：INEN以IEC标准为基础发布强制性RTE INEN技术法规；若存在受监管的BESS产品类别，则在厄瓜多尔进口和销售前须取得INEN合格证书。独立于强制性RTE INEN范围之外，项目业主、ARCERNNR和配电公司以IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据——中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）通过normalizacion.gob.ec核实INEN RTE INEN受监管产品清单，确认是否存在针对BESS电芯或系统的强制性进口前合格证书义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至厄瓜多尔BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认适用IEC 62619版本及任何INEN专项额外要求；（d）若需要RTE INEN合格证书，在出货前聘请INEN认可的合格评定机构（认证机构）进行产品认证。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：INEN以IEC標準為基礎發布強制性RTE INEN技術法規；若存在受監管的BESS產品類別，則在厄瓜多進口和銷售前須取得INEN合格證書。獨立於強制性RTE INEN範圍之外，項目業主、ARCERNNR和配電公司以IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據——中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）通過normalizacion.gob.ec核實INEN RTE INEN受監管產品清單，確認是否存在針對BESS電芯或系統的強制性進口前合格證書義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至厄瓜多BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認適用IEC 62619版本及任何INEN專項額外要求；（d）若需要RTE INEN合格證書，在出貨前聘請INEN認可的合格評定機構（認證機構）進行產品認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory RTE INEN conformity certificate if BESS falls within a regulated product category — verify current scope at normalizacion.gob.ec; IEC 62619 evidence mandatory in project practice regardless of RTE INEN scope; no confirmed RTE INEN specifically for stationary BESS as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; neither is accepted as equivalent to IEC 62619 in Ecuador

source.publisher: INEN — Servicio Ecuatoriano de Normalización (Ecuador national standards body)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] INEN issues mandatory RTE INEN conformity requirements for regulated product categories; verify whether BESS cells or systems are within current RTE INEN scope at normalizacion.gob.ec before shipment. Independently, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Ecuador project specifications. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Ecuador project acceptance. Verify INEN current regulated-product scope and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with INEN, ARCERNNR, the project owner, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] INEN对受监管产品类别发布强制性RTE INEN合格评定要求；在出货前通过normalizacion.gob.ec核实BESS电芯或系统是否在现行RTE INEN范围内。独立地，IEC 62619是厄瓜多尔项目规格中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足厄瓜多尔项目验收要求。出货前请向INEN、ARCERNNR、项目业主及任何指定合格评定机构核实INEN现行受监管产品范围及IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] INEN對受監管產品類別發布強制性RTE INEN合格評定要求；在出貨前通過normalizacion.gob.ec核實BESS電芯或系統是否在現行RTE INEN範圍內。獨立地，IEC 62619是厄瓜多項目規格中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足厄瓜多項目驗收要求。出貨前請向INEN、ARCERNNR、項目業主及任何指定合格評定機構核實INEN現行受監管產品範圍及IEC 62619證據要求。
